title: Yui leave her son and her husband breaking havoc in the world
display_title: Yui leave her son and her husband breaking havoc in the world
wikitext:
[]: Yui leave her son and her husband, breaking havoc in the world...             Quote Post by The_Max » Thu Aug 26, 2021 3:29 pm ... and after many years of untold human suffering she sacrifices to atone her own acts. Nice By the way... what is Wunder's monitor pixel size and resolution? Ritsuko found Unit 13 looking at the monitor using binoculars

[]: Re: Yui leave her son and her husband, breaking havoc in the world...             Quote Post by wiser3754 » Thu Aug 26, 2021 9:28 pm You seem to forget that Misato's father, Dr Katsuragi is the one who was the spearhead to Second Impact and Human Instrumentality. Sacrifice in NTE is a reccurant theme. Kaji, Gendo, Yui, Kaworu, Asuka, Misato all go through it.
